internacional.title: Woods, Mickelson and the Biggest Storylines as 2026 Masters Nears
internacional.description: As the 2026 Masters Tournament gets underway on Thursday, there are some fairly significant news developments shaking up the golfing world. Tiger Woods is out thanks to another DUI incident.

internacional.title: Indore News: Man Arrested With MD Drugs Worth ₹1 Lakh
internacional.description: Police caught Sameer alias Tagda near Bombay International School with 10 grams of MD, valued at around Rs 1 lakh. The suspect allegedly admitted selling drugs to fund his addiction. A case under the NDPS Act has been registered, and further investigation is underway to identify the source and any network involved.
